children.text: that real estate appraisals be performed in accordance with generally accepted appraisal standards as evidenced by the appraisal standards promulgated by the Appraisal Standards Board of the Appraisal Foundation;
that such appraisals shall be written appraisals; and
that such appraisals shall be subject to appropriate review for compliance with the Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice.
